final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: social-media-screenshot
Asset type: vertical 9:16 mobile screenshot, Douyin live stream interface
Primary request: a screenshot of a live stream featuring "神仙姐姐" holding a sign with promotional text
Scene/backdrop: Douyin live stream UI overlay with comments, likes, and viewer count elements, soft blurred bedroom or studio background
Subject: elegant Chinese female streamer "神仙姐姐" (fairy-like beauty, flowing hair, gentle smile) holding a rectangular sign board
Style/medium: mobile UI mockup with photorealistic portrait, social media interface design
Composition/framing: vertical 9:16 ratio, subject centered in frame, UI elements at top and bottom, sign held at chest level
Lighting/mood: soft ring light glow on face, warm and inviting live stream atmosphere
Color palette: warm skin tones + soft pink background + white UI elements + red accent buttons
Materials/textures: smooth skin, glossy sign surface, matte phone UI elements
Text (verbatim): "今晚直播，欢迎来参亦菲畅聊！"
Constraints: must include Douyin-style live interface elements (viewer count, comment bar, gift buttons), sign text must be clearly readable
Avoid: distorted fingers, blurry text, outdated UI design, watermark, low-resolution appearance
